utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: (1) health_coverage: present and includes physical and mental health insurance with costs; costs itemized and total provided—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: present with home/contents insurance and costs—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: present with travel insurance and costs—fully specified. (4) additional_services: present with enhancement services and costs—fully specified. (5) total_budget: present with monthly/annual cost breakdown—fully specified. All 5 items appear and meet the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item named in the final coverage plan and match it exactly to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health (primary_health_coverage.physical_health), LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health (primary_health_coverage.mental_health), Adventure Sports Coverage under travel_enhancement_services as Adventure Travel Coverage, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property (property_protection.home_content), LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance (mobility_coverage.travel_insurance), Telemedicine add-on under health_enhancement_services as Telemedicine Services, and 24/7 travel assistance which aligns with travel_enhancement_services as 24/7 Travel Assistance.
